title: Implement User Authentication System
description: Build a secure, scalable authentication system with OAuth2 support, multi-factor authentication, and session management for the web application platform.

context.background: Current system uses basic authentication which does not meet security requirements. Need to implement industry-standard authentication with support for social login providers.
constraints: Must integrate with existing user database schema
Cannot introduce breaking changes to existing API endpoints
Must support at least 10,000 concurrent users
success_criteria: All authentication flows pass security audit
Response time under 200ms for auth operations
Zero data breaches or security incidents in first 3 months
